name: prompt-gen-custom
description: Generate a custom multi-agent swarm from a description (edit prompt/spec)

steps.text: Edit the prompt_gen step spec. Example: swarm: 4-agent technical blog (research, write, fact-check, SEO). Or pass extra goal via automate CLI.

steps.spec: swarm: 4-agent swarm for high-quality technical blog posts: researcher, writer, fact-checker, SEO optimizer
